description: Iterable is a customer engagement and cross-channel messaging platform used to manage users, campaigns, templates, journeys, catalogs, and related marketing data. It provides tooling for sending and tracking email, push, SMS, in-app, and embedded messaging interactions.
summary: Iterable exposes a REST API, a local npm-packaged MCP server, and an npm-packaged CLI; all use Iterable API keys, with the REST API also supporting JWT-enabled API keys plus per-user Bearer JWTs.
